title: CSAM hash-set verification
action: Run the case's image set against the agency's vetted CSAM hash sets (Project VIC, NCMEC, internal). Record matches with their source set, hash algorithm (typically SHA-1 or PhotoDNA), and the full file path inside the image. PhotoDNA-style perceptual matches must be reviewed by a sworn examiner before they're cited as evidence.
rationale: Hash-set verification is the legally defensible baseline for CSAM identification — automated PhotoDNA matches against vetted sets carry the chain-of-custody back to the originating ICAC / NCMEC submission. Manual review of every flagged image fulfils the human-in-the-loop requirement most jurisdictions impose for the charging decision.
expected_result: Hash-match report listing flagged files with their source set + match algorithm; reviewer attestation captured against each match; counts totalled by tier (Project VIC categories A/B/C/D, NCMEC tiers).
references: ICAC Task Force CSAM Hash-Set Standards

axiom.action: AXIOM Process → Hash Sets → enable Project VIC + the agency NCMEC import. AXIOM auto-categorises matches by Project VIC tier in the Pictures category; reviewers tag confirmed matches. Use the CSAM Categorization workflow under AXIOM Examine for the per-image reviewer attestation.
axiom.ui_path: AXIOM Process > Processing Details > Hash Sets > Project VIC; AXIOM Examine > Pictures > CSAM Categorization
axiom.notes: Project VIC requires a current credentials file from the agency POC; without it the set is registered but won't lookup. AXIOM's PhotoDNA support is gated behind a separate Magnet contract — confirm licensing before counting on it.

xways.action: X-Ways → Refine Volume Snapshot → Hash database matching. Load the Project VIC + NCMEC sets via Tools → Hash Database Manager. Filter by hash-match category and route flagged items into the Reviewed Files list with the examiner attestation column populated.
xways.ui_path: Tools > Hash Database Manager; Refine Volume Snapshot > Match Hash

autopsy.action: Autopsy → Tools → Options → Hash Sets → Import the agency Project VIC + NCMEC databases. Re-run Hash Lookup ingest if the set was added post-ingest. Hashset Hits node populates per category; tag confirmed matches with the examiner attestation tag.
autopsy.ui_path: Tools > Options > Hash Sets > Import; Tree > Hashset Hits
